tasks.instruction: Register for the lowest-priced individual ticket in USD that includes access to session recordings and complete a single-attendee checkout with basic contact and company details.

tasks.instruction: Choose the team ticket that covers at least three attendees and has the lowest price per person, then submit registration details for exactly three attendees under that ticket.

tasks.instruction: On the event agenda, add exactly three sessions to your personal schedule: one about email marketing, one about social media, and one about analytics or data.
